name: South African Vegetable Biryani
recipeIngredient: 6 chili peppers, crushed into a paste
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large, heavy skillet, fry the onions in the ghee until golden.
2. Using a slotted spoon, remove 1/3 of the onion slices and set aside.
3. Add the ginger, garlic, and chili paste to the pot and stir constantly for 5 or 6 minutes.
4. Incorporate lentils, peas, carrots, and beans; reduce heat and cook for 15 minutes.
5. If necessary, add more ghee to the mixture.
6. Stir in tomatoes, spices, and mint for an additional 5 minutes.
7. Pour in 1 cup of very hot water, cover, and simmer until the vegetables are half-cooked.
8. Add rice, potatoes, salt, and another 4 to 5 cups of hot water; cover and cook for 20 minutes or until the rice is done and the water is absorbed.
9. Garnish with the reserved onion slices.
